headline: NO-GO — under the rigorous OPEN-WORLD protocol the source-contamination defense catches contamination (99.2%) but OVER-BLOCKS 74.5% of clean controls; the 2026-06-28 curated 5.9% over-block was flattering.
runnerNote: Executed from the cloud session via OpenRouter (non-US models). 0 mock markers in any scored run.

families.note: Full rigorous open-world family. caught-rate CI-lower 0.977 (high, good) BUT over-block CI-upper 0.765 (very high, FAILS the 'defense must not destroy clean recall' criterion).

families.void_reason: OpenRouter infra: qwen-2.5-72b-instruct answer path returned HTTP400 'does not support endpoint: completions' (+ upstream 429). A crashed run is VOID, never scored. Retried non-US answer models mistral-7b (HTTP404 no endpoints) and qwen-2.5-7b — the harness answer path needs the /completions endpoint, which most non-US chat models on this key do not expose. Infra limit, not a scientific result.

gateEvaluation.VALIDATED_requires: >=3 runs/family answer!=judge + --retrieve, caught CI-low high AND over-block CI-up LOW, on >=2 families
gateEvaluation.why: VALIDATED is unreachable: the one valid rigorous open-world family (deepseek/qwen) FAILS the over-block criterion (74.5%, CI-up 76.5% >> low). One valid open-world measurement showing 74.5% over-block already refutes the curated 5.9%; the >=2-family bar was to confirm a GOOD result, not required to refuse one. The 2nd family was infra-blocked (see families[1]).
gateEvaluation.verdict: NO-GO (matches pre-registration: 'over-block-rate rises materially once refs are retrieved (open-world) — the curated/coupled setup was flattering the number').

interpretation: The independent-verifier defense reliably CATCHES contamination even open-world (99.2%), but its clean-control RECALL collapses when truth-refs are RETRIEVED rather than curated (over-block 5.9% -> 74.5%). Most likely mechanism: open-world Wikipedia refs do not reliably ENTAIL the clean facts, so the entailment gate flags legitimate clean answers as unsupported and abstains. This is a real limitation of the open-world defense as specified; the fix direction is retrieval quality / entailment calibration, not relaxing the bar. The curated 2026-06-28 result stays CANDIDATE and must NOT be promoted.
note: answered/over-block are MEASURED selective metrics on the pack, not per-token guarantees. canClaimAGI=false. Row source-contamination-live-multifamily-2026-06-28 stays candidate/NO-GO; do not relax the over-block bar.
